plugin.name: shift-switcher
plugin._long: Raises windows with a card-deck animation (Compiz shift style): a covered window slides out of the stack and back on top, so the eye can follow where it went.

option.name: duration
option._long: Total duration of the pull-out/slide-back animation.

option.name: tilt
option._long: Maximum rotation in degrees applied while the window travels, for a card-like feel. 0 disables rotation.

option.name: margin
option._long: Extra pixels the window travels beyond the edge of the windows covering it.
